violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knife)were observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC relocated knife to 3-bay sink to wash, rinse and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (dairy area), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Two floor tiles in the (meat & seafood) area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

Thermometers are lacking in several refrigeration units throughout the establishment. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

Large knives were observed stored in unclean area between a wall and a knife rack. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The gaskets on the doors of two separate walk-in coolers were observed heavily frayed 2) The kick plate and bottom area of the door to the dairy walk-in cooler was bent and exposing insulation New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers and light covers of several walk-in coolers have an accumulation of dust and biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The plumbing under the sanitizing bay of the three bay sink in the produce area was in poor repair (active leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The plumbing from the fans in several walk-in coolers had an accumulation of biofilm 2) The ceiling in walk-in cooler throughout the facility had dust and biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The following areas were observed in poor repair: 1) Ceiling tile(s) above ware-washing area in Bakery Department were loose or not in proper adjustment 2) Ceiling tiles in 'Pick Up' area were observed with water damage New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the produce ware-washing area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
